verses.text: Israel Pasian, Topa' Paisan Pawi a bawl dingin Jerusalem-a Topa' biakinn-ah hong paina dingun Hezekiah in Israel mi khempeuh leh Judah mite kiangah mi sawl a, Efraim mite leh Manasseh mite tungah zong laikhakte a gelh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa leh a uliante leh Jerusalem-a a kikhawm khempeuh in Paisan Pawi a kha nihna sungin bawl ding kikum khin uh hi
Siampite mi a kicingzah ding amau kisian'suah nailo uh a, mite zong Jerusalem-ah kikhawm nailo uh ahih manin a hunin bawl theilo uh hi
Hih geelna pen kumpipa leh a kikhawm khempeuh-a' dingin hoih leh kilawm hi

Tua ahih ciangin mite hong pai-in Israel Pasian, Topa-a' dingin Jerusalem-ah Paisan Pawi a bawlna dingun Beersheba panin Dan ciangdong Israel sung khempeuhah taangkona khat a bawlna ding uh thukhensatna khat bawl uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh bawl dinga a kigen bangin amaute in a lianpi-in bawl ngeilo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa leh a uliante kiang pana laikhakte tawh Israel khempeuh leh Judah sungah laikhakte tawh pai uh a, kumpipa' thupiakna: “Israel mite aw, Assiria kumpite' khutsung panin a suakta, a omlai note' lamah amah hong kiheikik theihna dingin Abraham, Isaac, leh Israel Pasian, Topa' lamah kiheikik un
Note in na theih uh bangin, amau' pute pate' Topa Pasian' tungah a cihtaklohna uh hangin nakpi takin gim a piak na pute na pate uh leh na sanggamte uh bang kei un

Tu-in na pute na pate uh bangin lungkhauh kei un la, note kiang panin a lauhuai ama hehna a kiheikhiat theihna dingin Topa' lamah kipia un la, amah in a tawntung dingin a sian'thosaksa a biakinn-ah Topa na Pasian uh bia un

Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh Topa' lamah note na kilehkik uh leh, na sanggamte uh leh na tate un amau a mante' tung panin hehpihna ngahin hih gamah hong ciahkik ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh dikna leh hehpihna a nei hi a, ama lamah na kiheikik nak uh leh note kiang panin a maitang heikhia lo ding hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Efraim leh Manasseh gamsung khuapi khat pan khuapi khat, leh Zebulun ciangdongah laitaite a pai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in na nuihsanin zahpih uh a, na simmawh bawl uh hi
Asher mi, Manasseh, leh Zebulun mi tawmkhat bek kiniamkhiatin Jerusalem-ah hong pai uh hi
Topa' thupiakna tawh kumpipa leh uliante' sawlna a sem dingin Judah mite tungah Pasian in lungsim kikhatna a guan' hi
Tua ciangin a kha nihna sungin silngo sawhloh anlum pawi a bawl dingin Jerusalem-ah mihon tampi tak hong pai uh hi
Amaute nasem dingin kipanin Jerusalem-a biakna taute hemkhia uh a, paknamtui halna ding biakna taute khempeuh amaute in lakhia-in Kidron kuamah paii uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in a kha nihna a ni sawmleli ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi. Tua ciangin biakna vai-in a siangtho nailo siampite leh Levi mite nakpi takin maizum uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau mah kisian'suahin Topa' biakinn sungah meihal biaknate hong paipih uh hi
Pasian' mipa Moses' thukham bangin amaute in amau' pan'mun ngei hong la uh a, siampite in Levi mite' khut tung panin a ngah uh sisan theh uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh a kikhawm lakah amau mah a kisian'suah nailo tampi om uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa' tungah a siangtho-in a kibawlna dingun a nin khempeuh-a' dingin Levi mite in Paisan Pawi tuuno a gawh ding uh kisam hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh mi tampi tak, Efraim, Manasseh, Issakhar, leh Zebulun sung pan, amau mah kisian'suah nailo uh a, ahi zongin ngeina lopi-in amaute in Paisan Pawi ne uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hezekiah in amaute-a' dingin thu ngenin, “Ka pute ka pate uh' Pasian a dik Topa aw
biakinn siangthona ngeina om bangin lungsim tak tawh nang hong biate khempeuh' mawhna maisak in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Hezekiah' thungetna pia-in mite' mawhna maisak a, gimna ngahsak lo hi

Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a om Israel mite in lungdamna lianpi tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite leh siampite in a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Topa la sak uh a, a ni ni-in Topa phat uh hi

Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topa' nasepna-ah a siamna hoih uh a lak Levi mite khempeuh tungah hanthotna thu a gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in pawi an ni sagih sung ne uh a, thunuama biakna pia-in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa tungah lungdamna a ko uh hi
Tua ciangin adang ni sagih sung mah tua pawi a bawlthuah lai ding uh a kikhawm khempeuh thukim uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh adang ni sagih sung mah bawlthuah uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in biakpiakna dingin a kikhawmte tungah bawngtal tul khat leh tuu tul sagih pia a, uliante in a kikhawmte tungah bawngtal tul khat leh tuu tul sawm pia uh hi. Siampite tampi tak amau mah kisian'suah uh hi

Judah mi a kikhawm khempeuh, leh siampite leh Levi mite, leh Israel panin a hong paikhia a kikhawm khempeuh, leh Israel gam panin a hong paikhia peemtate, leh Judah gamsungah a teng peemtate, lungdam uh hi
Israel kumpi David' tapa Solomon huna kipanin Jerusalem-ah hih bang om ngeilo ahih manin Jerusalem-ah lungdamna lianpi a om hi
Tua ahih ciangin siampite leh Levi mite dingin mite thupha pia uh a, amau' awging kiza-in, amau' thungetna in vantunga a siangtho ama ten'na a banto hi.
